title: Creation of parish development board
doc_html:
SUBPART B.  PARISH DEVELOPMENT BOARDS

§121.  Creation of parish development board

A police jury may create and organize a parish development board in accordance with the provisions of this Subpart.

Acts 2011, 1st Ex. Sess., No. 20, §1, eff. June 12, 2011.
